DECLARATION OF DR.DUAYNE DILLON IN SUPPORT OF MOTIOAN TO COMPEL PRODUCTION OF PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBIT 26 FROM THE DEPOSITION OF DIANE GAMBA FOR FORENSIC EXAMINATION AND FOR SANCTIONS AWARD FILED BY DEFENDANT GAMBA, DIANE INDIVIDUALLY AND AS TRUSTEE FOR THE DIANE J. GAMBA TRUST

DISCOVERY 301, DEFENDANT DIANE GAMBA'S MOTION TO COMPEL PRODUCTION OF ORIGINAL OF PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBIT 26 FROM THE DEPOSITION OF DIANE GAMBA FOR FORENSIC EXAMINATION IS GRANTED, PLAINTIFF SHALL PRODUCE THE ORIGINAL DOCUMENTS TO DEFENDANT'S EXPERT FOR NON DESTRUCTIVE TESTS OF DEFENDANT'S CHOOSING, AT A LOCATION CHOSEN BY DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF'S EXPERT MAY BE PRESENT TO OBSERVE DURING TESTING. THE TESTIMONY MAY CONTINUE FOR UP TO 2 DAYS ON DATES MUTUALLY AGREED IN THE NEXT 2 WEEKS. IF TESTIMONY CONTINUES BEYOND THE FIRST DAY, PLAINTIFF'S EXPERT MAY RETAIN CUSTODY BETWEEN SESSIONS. REQUEST FOR SANCTION IS DENIED BY THE COURT. PREVAILING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, NOT REPORTED.

Off Calendar Oct-07-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. ROBERT S. AARON OF AARON & WILSON, LLP, TEL. NO. 438-7801 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. JONATHAN D. BISHOP, TEL. NO. (650) 347-5000 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT.

RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: Defendant Diane Gamba'S Motion To Compel Production Of Original Of Plaintiff'S Exhibit 26 From The Deposition Of Diane Gamba For Forensic Examination is Granted, Plaintiff shall produce the original documents to defendant's expert for non destructive tests of defendant's choosing, at a location chosen by defendant. Plaintiff's expert may be present to observe during testing. The testimony may continue for up to 2 days on dates mutually agreed in the next 2 weeks. If testimony continues beyond the first day, plaintiff's expert may retain custody between sessions. Requestfor Sanction is denied by the court. Prevailing party is to submit a proposed form of order. Judge : Peter J. Busch, NOT REPORTED. = (301/PJB)
